svg.text: Map Blueprint v11 — Overtaken Castle (reference version)
Hay bale collision fixed, corner N-S lanes added near the castle
Grid: each cell = 5m (50px). Contour lines: 2m elevation interval.

g.text: Movement Speed Reference (1 second of travel)
Sprint: ~7 m/s (estimate — not yet tuned in-engine)
(actual routing around obstacles/hills will run longer)

svg.text: Wall ~3m thick, ~8m tall, gentle curve bulging toward midfield

g.text: wall physically joins the tower here

svg.text: 4 ways through: Breach 1, Main Gate, Breach 2, Breach 3 — plus climb/vault the wall anywhere
Natural rise, east tower built atop it — bird's-eye view over the wheat field
Natural rise, west tower + watchtower share the high ground

g.text: concealment, not full cover — countered by AoE abilities
and elevated vantage (nearby hill/towers see over it)

svg.text: (wall-tag proportions — Console run-face vs PC wall-jump-pair — next annotation pass)
FORECOURT — no straight run to the Relic

g.text: DEFENDER STRONGHOLD — Castle Keep + Wizard Tower
Relic spawns in main tower base. Defenders roam anywhere except the attacker home area.
Ruin wall (10 are N–S run lanes)
